productDisplayName: Nike Women Pegasus White Blue Shoe
description: A MARATHONER'S DREAM Perfectly and neutrally cushioned to provide that absolute comfort for your heels and feet while running, the nike Air Pegasus 27 is absolutely versatile. Constructed with a full-length cushion foam coupled with a nike Zoom unit in the heel, the Nike Air Pegasus 27 shoe provides improved flexibility, enhancing comfort. Run light and long A marathon lover’s dream, the Nike Air Pegasus 27 has an added touch of softness offering a smooth and effortless ride. Neutrally designed, this range of shoes is perfect for underpronated and overpronated runners. However, the shoe’s signature feature is its Nike Zoom Air system, which is an absolutely springy cushioning system designed by Nike to absorb those uncomfortable poundings and shakes that serious runners often end up with. Besides, the shoe is absolutely lightweight with the women’s shoe weight about 244 grams and the men’s about 312 grams, making it an absolutely light run. The Nike Air Pegasus 27 is a marathon trainer shoe and hence, is engineered with a softer midsole and more flexible forefoot for unparalleled comfort during long distance running. These features only enhance the shoe’s already impeccable cushioning system. The upper of the shoe is primarily meshed to provide ample ventilation for the feet, keeping them dry and comfortable during those long runs, while the two simple overlay bands effectively anchor the laces, ensuring that the stitches do not get in the way of the inside of the individual’s foot, preventing blistering. Users of the Nike Air Pegasus 27 have always loved its feel on their feet, crediting its effective cushioning system. So grab this opportunity and pick your pair today! Upper Open mesh upper with strategic overlays for breathability and support Arch support to help stabilize the foot while enabling natural movement sock liner that moulds to the shape of the foot for a custom Fit with great support Abrasion resistant carbon rubber under the heel for heightened durability in this high-wear area Abrasion resistant carbon rubber embedded onto the upper Midsole Segmented crash pad for shock absorption and a smooth transition Premium cushlon EVA midsole foam supplies soft, responsive plush for a supportive underfoot feel. Outsole Deep, Gender-specific flex grooves for fluid movement through the gait cycle Environmentally preferred rubber outsole for multi-surface traction and durability Wash care1. Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine wash
